error_message: ERROR MESSAGE: "No AMF is associated to the gNB" (logged by NGAP module)

phase3_fixes.error_text: ERROR MESSAGE: "No AMF is associated to the gNB" (logged by NGAP module)

fix_suggestion.reason: The error 'No AMF is associated to the gNB' occurs because the gNB fails to find any AMF association during the initial NAS request processing.
fix_suggestion.config_fix: Update cu_gnb.conf to set amf_ip_address and GNB_IPV4_ADDRESS_FOR_NG_AMF to deployment-matching values.
fix_suggestion.root_cause_analysis: Network configuration mismatch prevents AMF association.
investigation_steps: Verify gNB NG interface IP in cu_gnb.conf.
fix_suggestion.specification_context: - No 3GPP specification context found (embeddings file missing)

terminal_commands.explanation: Test basic connectivity from gNB to AMF IP

terminal_commands.command: ip route add 192.168.70.132 via 10.138.77.217 dev eth0
terminal_commands.explanation: Add static route to reach AMF IP via core network IP on interface eth0
